title: Teeth
questions: What images spring to mind when you hear the word 'teeth'?
What do you do to you look after your teeth?
Is it important to have straight white teeth?
How would you feel about having false teeth (dentures)?
Why are wisdom teeth called wisdom teeth?
Have you ever had a really bad toothache?
When was the last time you gritted your teeth?
Have you ever felt like someone kicked you in the teeth?
Do you go through a ritual every time you brush your teeth?
Someone once said: "Too many of today's children have straight teeth and crooked morals." What does this mean? Do you think it's true?
Do you like your teeth?
When you were a child, what did you do with your milk teeth after they fell out?
Do you worry about tooth decay?
Do you have a sweet tooth?
What do you think when you lose a tooth or have to have one pulled out at the dentist?
What is a tooth fairy and how much money do they leave?
Do you have many fillings?
Do you think people in the future will have very healthy teeth?
What do you think of the idea of painted teeth?
What do you do when you get food stuck between your teeth?
